summary: Good recording with a standout second‑jam solo in Eyes
review: The reviewer highlights the second jam of “Eyes” as having the best solo of the night, capturing the crowd’s rising energy. No specific comments about the source or sound quality are provided, so the recording is presumed listenable but uncharacterized.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review praising a specific performance; no information on recording quality, so rating leans toward the show’s strength while accounting for unknown audio fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any technical issues were made by reviewers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review focuses solely on the Eyes jam; no broader set‑list commentary is available.
